summary.what: Cut v0.22.1: Phase 0 diagnostic surface for side-branch latest-anchor (Laura friction)
summary.why: Patch release — diagnostic-only Phase 0 of the pending-detection refactor. No algorithm change. Ships the contract test that captures Laura's pathology and the surface improvements (pending hint, doctor check) that point users at existing escape hatches
